raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta atgreeſahs tee diwi
Wibri/ un nogahje no teem Kal-
neem/ un zehlahs pahri/ un nah-
ze pee Josuü Nunna Dehlu/
un teize tam wiſſu/ kas teem
notizzis bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee fazzija us Josuü:
Teescham tas KUNGS irr wit-
fu to Semmi muhſäs Rohkäs
dewis/ ir wiſſi Semmes Eedsih-
wotaji irr baiłigi preekſch mums.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ta III. Nodalla.
Josuü nahk ar teem Laudim pee Jardanaß: 1.
Las Derribas Schkirsts tohy to Lauschu
Preekſchã nests: 3/ 6. Ta Jardana pahr-
dallahs/ ka tee Israëla Behrni fausahm Rah,
jahm zaureet: 14/ 16.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ad zehlahs Josuüs Rih-
tã agri/ un tee aizgahje
no Sittim/ un nahze
lihds Jardanai/ wiſsch un wiſti
Israëta Behrni: Un tee palikke
tur zaur Nakti/ pirms tee pahr-
zehlahs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pehz trim Deenahin
gahje tee Wirſneeki zaur Lehge-
ra Widdu:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un pawehleja teem Laudim/
fazzidami: Kad juhs redfeſeet
ta KUNGA jubfo Decwa Der-
ribas Schkirstu/ un tohs Pree-
sterus/ tohs Lewitus to neſſam/
tad zelleetecsjuhs no juhsas Wee-
tas/ un eita wiſſam pakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tomehr lai Starpiba pa-
ket starp jums/ un starp winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "pee diwi tuhſſoschn Ohleſchu
Mehra/ un ne pee-eita tuwu pee
ta/ tapehz/ ka juhs to Zettu sin-
naht warrat/ kas jums ja-eet/ jo
juhs ne effat ſcho Zettu wehl ne
kad gabjuschti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Josuüs fazzija arridsan us
teem Laudim : Swehtijeetees/ jo
Rihtã darrihs tas KUNGS juh-
fu Starpã Brihnnumus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta lihds ruunaja Josuüs
us teem Preestereem fazzidams:
Pazelleet to Derribas Schkirstu/
un eita pahri to Lauschu Preek-
scha. Tad uhszehle tee to Der-
ribas Schkirstu/ un gahje teem
Laudim preekſcha.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS bij us
Josuü fazztjis: Schodeen eeſahk-
schu es tew pa-augstinaht wiſſa
Israëta Azzis: Ka teem buhs
finnaht/ ka es ar tew buhſchu/ it-
tin ka es ar Mohſu ejun bijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tew buhs tad teem Pree-
steruem/ kas to Derribas Schkir-
stu ness/ pawehleht un fazziht:
Kad juhs lihds Jardanas Mallai
Uhdeni nahkat/ tad apstahjeecees
Jardana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Josuüs us
teem Israëta Behrneem: Nah-
zeet ſchurp/ un klaufait ta KUN-
GA juhsu Deewa Wahrđus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jesuüs fazzija : Pee
ta buhs jums finnaht/ to dſihu
STIPRAJO DEEWU juh-
fo Widdu effam/ ka wiſſch ig-
dſihdains iſdsıhs juhsu Preek-
cha tohs Kananiterus/ un tohs
Eetiterus/ un tohs Eewiterus/
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
